summary: Recording sounds great despite an uneven show – short first set and a meandering second set, but Steve Miller’s cameo and solid drumming provide bright spots.
review: The audio capture is praised as sounding great, indicating a clean and listenable source, though reviewers do not specify whether it is soundboard or audience. The concert itself received mixed feedback: one attendee found the performance lackluster with a short first set and a second set that felt like “trudging,” while another highlighted Steve Miller’s guest appearance and Jerry Garcia’s strong solos as highlights, and drums were noted as the saving grace.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is average to below‑average (mixed comments) while recording quality is praised as good; weighted combination yields a mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recording described as sounding great with no noted issues; reviewers did not mention specific technical problems or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set was unusually short (six songs) followed by a long ~45‑minute break; second set felt sluggish to some listeners, though guest guitarist Steve Miller and strong drum work were cited as positives.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia rises to the occasion with great solos during the Steve Miller‑accompanied numbers.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drumming was praised as the saving grace of an otherwise uneven performance.
